description: Case style: Analogue watch with circular case and stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial, has bronze toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, bronze toned seconds hand and markings, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three chronograph faces, year and month aperture below the 12 hour mark, annual calendarStrap style: Brown, textured, leather strap with stitched detail, has a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
